subject: Re: library
body:
I haven't been asked a question or seen a drawing for two weeks or more,, during this stage of the process, whether it be for pool building interior,, we need to get moving.. Library needs to be terraced, model needs to be shown of both library and main house, an a schedule for drawings agreed with Amerling.


----- Original Message ----
From: Sabina Fabris <sabina@molyneuxstudio.fr>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, November 10, 2006 1:16:34 AM
Subject: library


Finally I was able to reduce it !

I haven't been asked a question or seen a drawing for two weeks or more,, during this stage of the process, whether it be for pool building interior,, we need to get moving.. Library needs to be terraced, model needs to be shown of both library and main house, an a schedule for drawings agreed with Amerling.

Finally I was able to reduce it !

subject: Re: library
body_html:
thank you... the plans need drastic change.... and the process needs to be revamped...  persepctive drawings would be a great help.. .. it is taking much too long to get draft idea.s   , for example.. for the tenth time.. there is no compass on the drawings,, this makes it very difficult to read,, I must guess the location of north..,, from the beginning the secretarys office, had to relate to the library, it doesn't. there is no room for storage computers, fax and printers,, by tring to reuse the current library as sitting room,, the dependecies are much too large for the now correct dimensions of the library. by having the initial wrong dimensions , the work so far is wasted. . we should use the sitting room layout in the main house,  and redesign a smaller, sitting room for this complex,, that also make s the classroom more managelble... I have been waiting for a simple cardboard model of the main house for two months,, with the model and scraps of paper we moved forward quickly,,,  the masssing of this building , needs to be rethought,,, and quickly....

----- Original Message ----
From: Sabina Fabris <sabina@molyneuxstudio.fr>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, November 10, 2006 3:16:34 AM
Subject: library

Finally I was able to reduce it !

subject: Re: library
body:
The building sit on the land and not in.. we have to
do a better job of the landscape architecure designed
to allow the building to grow from the land  not sit
on it.. the craft building is a perfect example// it
will look terrible from most directions. 

--- jpm6929@aol.com wrote:

> Jeffrey,
> I am sending you here the library building new plan,
> the plan on the topo lines, and possible connecting
> roads.
> Call me at your convenience.
> JP
